creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 245492
Screenshot of content to which readers of the FreeBSD Handbook are directed

Closing note, from the reporter of this bug: my pull request included the attached screenshot.

IMHO, it's no longer appropriate for the FreeBSD Project to steer readers towards areas such as these, but that's just my humble opinion, as a person who has no interest in things such as GBL or GHB.
